metadata.name: Prepare for an Animal Welfare Audit

description: A pork producer is preparing for a third-party animal welfare audit and needs to ensure all documentation is in order.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the checklist for the specific animal welfare audit standard (e.g., PQA Plus).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the official audit checklist.

nodes.task_description: For each item on the checklist, retrieve the corresponding farm records, such as treatment records, training logs, and SOPs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all the required documentation from the farm's records.

nodes.task_description: Compile all the documents into an organized package for the auditor and flag any areas where documentation is missing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a complete package and identifies one missing training log.
